name: Lycan
description: A wolf in man's clothing. Banehallow, the Lycan Bites and turns the affected allied hero into a ferocious Wolf Form of Shapeshift's corresponding level. The lycanthropy grants both Lycan and the affected ally lifesteal. Additionally, the ally's lifesteal in Wolf Form heals Lycan, and Lycan's lifesteal heals his ally within a certain distance.

abilities.name: Apex Predator
abilities.description: Lycan and his player-controlled units deal bonus conditional attack damage to neutral creeps per hero level. The higher Lycan's level, the greater the bonus conditional attack damage value. Attack Damage Bonus Increase: 2%.

abilities.name: Summon Wolves
abilities.description: Summons a pack of wolves to fight for Lycan. In time, these wolves have Permanent Invisibility and Cripple. The very enchantment that twisted his being also summons canine familiars. Number of Wolves: 2 (3). Duration: 50. Cooldown: 115/120/125/130.

abilities.name: Howl
abilities.description: Strike fear while reducing their armor and attack damage of all enemy units within the radius of Lycan and his wolves. The terrifying howl causes summons to temporarily run away in fear towards their fountain. Effect Radius: 2000. Attack Damage Reduction: 25%/30%/35%/40% (0%). Armor Reduction: 4/5/6/7 (7/8/9/10). Duration: 8. Total Attack Damage Reduction: (4/5/6/7). Effect Radius: Global. Cooldown: 22/20/18/16. Mana Cost: 40.

abilities.name: Feral Impulse
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage and bonus health regeneration to Lycan and all of his player-controlled units. Radius: Global Attack. Damage Bonus: 10%/20%/30%/40% (35%/45%/55%/65%). Health Regen Bonus: 1/3/5/7. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Radius: Global. Attack Damage Bonus: 10%/20%/30%/40% (35%/45%/55%/65%).

abilities.name: Wolf Bite
abilities.description: Bites and turns the affected allied hero into a ferocious Wolf Form of Shapeshift's corresponding level. The lycanthropy grants both Lycan and the affected ally lifesteal. Additionally, the ally's lifesteal in Wolf Form heals Lycan, and Lycan's lifesteal heals his ally within a certain distance. Grants Lycan's attack lifesteal upon cast. Cast Range: 300. Transformation Time: 1.1. Set Base Attack Range: 150. Base Night Vision Bonus: 1000. Health Bonus: 225/325/425. Lifesteal: 30%. Cooldown: 125/110/95. Mana Cost: 150.

abilities.name: Shapeshift
abilities.description: Grants Lycan haste movement and critical strike. Transform Time: 1.1. Set Base Attack Range: 150. Base Night Vision Bonus: 1000. Health Bonus: 225/325/425. Duration: 25 (32). Aura Radius: 0. Cooldown: 110/100/90. Mana Cost: 100.
